item.title: B2B_ACCOUNT_SETUP_MANUAL
item.description: B2B Client Account Setup (Manual Process) Last Updated: 2026-04-27 This document describes how to manually set up a SendSwell account for a B2B client when using invoice-based billing instead of self-service checkout.

item.title: Welcome
item.description: This is your new vault. Make a note of something, create a link, or try the Importer! When you’re ready, delete this note and make the vault your own.
